name: MCP Tool Call (Sonnet 4.6, Wave 2)
description: Request that triggers a filesystem Read to observe MCP tool name shape, defer_loading behavior, and tool array alphabetization in the wire payload.
prompt: Read the first 10 lines of README.md and summarize in one sentence.
expectedBehavior: tools[] contains MCP-prefixed tool definitions (mcp_PascalCase). Tools are alphabetized. If CC v2.1.112 uses tool lazy loading, MCP tools have defer_loading: true and a tool_search_tool_* server-side tool is injected.
